idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends searches for 'DIY home repair' signals consumer stress lifting XLY
behavior: An uptick in DIY home repair searches often precedes increased discretionary spending on home improvement and related retail sectors.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary spending tends to rise as home repair interest grows.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLY when 3-week moving average of 'DIY home repair' searches rises 15%+ versus prior 3 weeks
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when the search interest drops below its 3-week moving average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly Google Trends data often shows multiple spikes per year in home repair interest.

idea: Labor Jobs report weekly spike in temp job postings signals short-term XLY weakness

data.source: Indeed temp job postings weekly count

behavior: A sudden surge in temporary job postings often indicates companies preparing for economic uncertainty or layoffs, leading to consumer caution.

market_impact.rationale: Temporary job growth spikes reflect labor market caution that can depress discretionary spending.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLY when temp job postings increase 20%+ over prior 2 weeks
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or when postings revert below 10% increase

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly labor job postings regularly show sudden temp job surges around seasonal and business cycle events.

idea: Freight logistics weekly spike in railcar dwell time signals bearish XLI

data.source: Railcar dwell time weekly averages from public rail data

behavior: Increased railcar dwell time suggests supply chain slowdowns, pressuring industrial production and transportation.

market_impact.rationale: Supply chain bottlenecks typically signal industrial sector headwinds.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI when railcar dwell time rises above 90th percentile of last 12 weeks
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when dwell time falls below 75th percentile

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Railcar dwell time fluctuates regularly with seasonal and macro disruptions.

idea: Macro input pressure from weekly FRED crude oil inventory builds signals bearish XLE

data.source: FRED weekly crude oil inventory levels

behavior: Rising crude oil inventories generally depress energy prices, pressuring energy sector stocks.

market_impact.rationale: Inventory builds often forecast weaker oil prices and energy company earnings.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLE when crude inventories rise 5%+ over prior 2 weeks
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or when inventories decline 3%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly crude inventories frequently change due to refinery cycles and geopolitical events.

idea: Consumer stress signaled by weekly Google trend spike in 'unemployment benefits' searches, bearish XLF
behavior: Rising search interest in unemployment benefits signals growing consumer financial stress, often pressuring financial sector stocks.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer stress reduces credit demand and loan performance, negatively affecting financials.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLF when 'unemployment benefits' searches rise 20%+ over prior 3 weeks
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 weeks or when searches revert below 10% increase

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Economic fluctuations cause frequent weekly variations in unemployment benefit searches.

idea: Weekly increase in local economy weirdness: sudden rise in building permit denials, bearish XLRE

data.source: Municipal building permit denial counts weekly scrape

behavior: Rising permit denials imply local regulatory or economic headwinds, pressuring real estate development and XLRE.

market_impact.rationale: Permit denials restrict new real estate supply and signal economic weakness.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLRE when weekly permit denials rise 30%+ over prior 4 weeks
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 6 weeks or when denials fall below 10% increase

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Local government data releases regularly produce weekly permit fluctuations.

idea: Attention sentiment spike: daily surge in news RSS counts mentioning 'cyberattack' triggers bullish XLC

data.source: RSS news feed counts for 'cyberattack' keyword

behavior: Sudden spikes in cyberattack news drive demand for communication security and cloud services.

market_impact.rationale: Heightened cyberattack awareness tends to buoy cybersecurity-related communications firms.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLC if daily RSS count for 'cyberattack' doubles 2-day moving average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or when RSS counts return below 1.2x moving average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Cyberattack news surges happen frequently due to ongoing cybersecurity threats.

idea: Travel mobility weekly jump in car rental bookings signals bullish XLY

data.source: Car rental company weekly booking data

behavior: Rising car rental bookings precede increased travel and discretionary spending, driving XLY gains.

market_impact.rationale: Travel-related consumption growth boosts consumer discretionary stocks.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLY when weekly bookings increase 15%+ over prior 3 weeks
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when bookings drop below 5% increase

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly travel data often experiences spikes around holidays and seasonal travel.

idea: Political insider filing surge in utilities sector signals bearish XLU

data.source: Insider trading filings in utilities sector

behavior: Increased insider selling in utilities often signals upcoming sector weakness or regulatory risk.

market_impact.rationale: Insider selling precedes sector underperformance due to anticipated headwinds.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLU when insider sell filings exceed 150% of 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 6 weeks or when filings revert below 120%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Insider trading filings vary weekly with ongoing corporate actions.

idea: Earthquake activity daily spike in magnitude 4+ events near key ports signals bearish XLI
behavior: Sudden increased earthquake activity near major port hubs disrupts logistics and industrial activity.

market_impact.rationale: Port disruptions reduce industrial throughput and supply chain efficiency.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI if daily count of magnitude 4+ earthquakes near ports doubles prior 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or when counts return below 1.2x average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seismic activity near ports regularly produces short-term spikes.

idea: Weekly surge in openchargemap EV charger installations signals bullish XLC
behavior: Rapid increases in EV charger installations indicate accelerating EV adoption and infrastructure investment.

market_impact.rationale: Communication and tech firms benefit from EV ecosystem growth.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLC when weekly charger counts rise 10%+ over prior 3 weeks
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 6 weeks or when growth slows below 3%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly charger deployment data often shows growth bursts due to project completions.

idea: Consumer stress detected by daily spike in Google Trends searches for 'budget credit cards', bearish XLF
behavior: Rising interest in budget credit cards signals increased consumer credit stress, pressuring financial stocks.

market_impact.rationale: Stress in consumer credit markets reduces bank profitability.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLF when daily searches for 'budget credit cards' spike 50%+ over 5-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or when searches normalize below 20% increase

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Credit stress-related search spikes occur frequently around economic news.

idea: Macro input pressure from weekly FRED CPI input prices rising signals bearish XLP

data.source: FRED weekly CPI input price indices

behavior: Rising CPI input prices indicate cost pressures on consumer staples, squeezing margins.

market_impact.rationale: Higher input costs reduce profitability in staples sector.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLP when CPI input price index rises 2%+ over prior 4 weeks
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 6 weeks or when index falls below 1% increase

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Input price indices regularly move with commodity and supply chain shifts.

idea: Attention sentiment daily spike in RSS news counts for 'pharmaceutical price hike' triggers bearish XLV

data.source: RSS news feed counts for 'pharmaceutical price hike'

behavior: Sudden news surges on drug price hikes increase regulatory risk and negative sentiment for healthcare sector.

market_impact.rationale: News-driven regulatory fears pressure healthcare stocks.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLV when daily RSS counts for 'pharmaceutical price hike' exceed 3x 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or when counts fall below 1.5x average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Healthcare news cycles regularly generate short-term spikes in drug pricing stories.

idea: Travel mobility weekly surge in hotel occupancy rates signals bullish XLY
behavior: Rising hotel occupancy rates indicate stronger travel demand, boosting consumer discretionary sector.

market_impact.rationale: Increased travel spending supports discretionary consumption stocks.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLY when weekly hotel occupancy rises 10%+ over prior 4 weeks
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 weeks or when occupancy drops below 5% increase

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Hotel occupancy varies weekly with travel seasonality and events.
